parameters.name: vref
parameters.override_behavior: sets the analog full-scale reference and segment span

parameters.name: vh
parameters.override_behavior: sets the voltage-coded segment high level

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic combinational voltage-domain thermometer encoding.
Preserve segment order from t0 through t15.
Use smooth voltage contributions and do not emit a binary-coded word, hidden state, validation hooks, or simulator-specific side channels.

properties.observable_contract: Active segment outputs always form a contiguous prefix beginning at t0; no higher segment may be high while a lower segment is low.
As vin increases, segments activate in order t0 through t15 and the active-segment count never decreases.
The clipped 0-to-vref input span selects among sixteen equal-width thermometer segments.
Inputs at or below 0 V produce no active segments, and inputs at or above vref produce all sixteen active segments.
Each inactive segment approaches 0 V and each active segment approaches vh with finite transition smoothing.

title: Thermometer Bus Encoder
